properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6 v4 v7 v4 v8 v4 v9 v4 v10 v4 v11 v4 v12 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There we were in Egypt, under Pharaoh's mighty hand, We were bound by wrong religion, and caught in the creed of man; Then a prophet from the desert Starts preaching all around, God has heard our prayer, Jehovah has come down.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Moses sure was no good speaker, Nothing polished I could tell, But we all began to notice that he knew Jehovah well; As he stood behind the pulpit, Showing signs of God's great power, It's Jehovah here, the Message of the hour.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: On the journey through the desert, 'Bout thirty miles high, Was a cloud that led us everyday, And at night a pillar of fire. If you ask for my opinion, all that I can say, It's Jehovah here to lead us all the way.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I know Jehovah's here to lead us all the way, A pillar of fire by night and a cloud by day; I know Jehovah's here to lead us all the way, And I will follow every thing He has to say.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Subchorus: I will never part, I will always stay; This Word inside my heart will lead us all the way.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: They rush in the city they run on the wall x2 for great is the army that carries out His Word

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: The Lord utters HIS voice before His Army x2

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Blow the trumphet in Zion, Zion Sound the alarm on my Holy Mountain blow the trumphet in Zion, Zion sound the alarm

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I lay in Zion for a foundation a stone x2

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: A tried stone, a precious corner stone a sure foundation, a sure foundation a tried stone, a precious corner stone he that believeth, shall not make haste.

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Jehovah-Jireh, my provider His grace is sufficient for me, For me, for me Jehovah-Jireh, my provider His grace is sufficient For me,

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: My God shall supply all my needs According to his riches in glory He gave His angels charge over me Jehovah-Jireh, cares for me for me, for me Jehovah-Jireh cares for me
